name: Gingerbread (Duff)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the shortening for 30 seconds.
2. Add sugar and beat until well combined and light and fluffy.
3. Dissolve molasses in boiling water and set aside.
4. In a large bowl, sift together the dry ingredients: flour, ginger, cinnamon, baking powder, and baking soda.
5. Gradually add the wet mixture (sugar and shortening) to the dry mixture.
6. Mix in the dissolved molasses.
7. Ensure all is well mixed.
8. Pour the batter into a greased loaf tin.
9. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes at 350°F.
